overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a yellow jacket exploring an industrial waterfront district of Night City. The character walks along concrete pathways past high-voltage towers, pauses at a scenic overlook to view the neon-lit skyline across the water, then continues through urban streets with elevated highways and light traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront walkway with power infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk beside industrial buildings and high voltage towers

entered.detail: large rusted metal electrical transmission tower with multiple crossbars
concrete industrial structure with weathered walls
wide concrete pedestrian walkway with visible seams
metal security fence running along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an industrial waterfront pathway. High voltage towers dominate the right side while a chain-link fence and industrial buildings line the left. The concrete sidewalk stretches forward toward a distant futuristic skyline under clear afternoon skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront overlook with panoramic city view

events.description: character stops at railing and camera pans to reveal the cityscape across the water

agents.ego_description: standing at the overlook railing admiring the neon-lit skyline and river view

entered.detail: tall building covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage
wide river reflecting the afternoon light with gentle ripples
red suspension bridge spanning the river to the city center
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with spires and antennas

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a waterfront overlook. The camera pans across a stunning view of Night City's skyline across the river, featuring neon-covered skyscrapers, a prominent red bridge, and holographic advertisements glowing in the afternoon sun.

events.description: character turns away from the overlook and begins walking back along the path

agents.ego_description: walking back along the industrial pathway away from the waterfront overlook

entered.detail: large rusted metal electrical transmission tower returning to view
concrete industrial warehouse structures in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks back along the industrial pathway. The high voltage towers and industrial buildings return to view as the camera moves away from the waterfront overlook, retracing the route along the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with elevated highway

events.description: transition from industrial zone to busier commercial street with palm trees and elevated highway
increased vehicle traffic passing on the adjacent multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking briskly along the city sidewalk passing street vendors and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a mat on the sidewalk with belongings
red sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure with multiple support columns
tall palm tree growing near the elevated highway structure
modern street light pole with dual lamps
multi-story commercial structures with signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character transitions to a busier urban commercial street. An elevated highway runs along the right side with palm trees at its base, while commercial buildings line the left. The character passes pedestrians sitting on the sidewalk and shares the space with moderate vehicle traffic flowing along the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a desolate industrial waterfront and transitions into a bustling urban commercial district. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk flanked by high-voltage towers and chain-link fences, moving steadily toward a distant futuristic skyline. As the character reaches a waterfront overlook, the camera pans across the river to reveal the neon-covered skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and a prominent red bridge glowing in the afternoon sun. The scene then shifts as the character turns back, retracing the route past the industrial buildings before the environment opens up into a busier city street. Finally, the camera follows the character past pedestrians and flowing vehicle traffic, moving beneath an elevated highway lined with palm trees and commercial architecture.
